text: A healthy lifestyle doesn’t have to be complicated, but it does require balance. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, gives your body the fuel it needs. Combined with regular exercise, like walking or swimming, you can improve your strength and mood. Equally important is sleep, which helps your body recover and your mind recharge. Don’t forget your mental health, either. Managing stress through hobbies or quiet time is just as vital as physical care. Finally, aim for a healthy work-life balance. Make time for friends and family to build happiness and reduce burnout. All these elements work together for true well-being.
